understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to complete the KA59 puzzle game by solving each level: every goal tile marked with a `+` had to be occupied simultaneously by a selectable piece in order to trigger a WIN and progress until the full run reports WIN.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement was done either by directional MOVE actions (moving the currently selected piece one grid step, blocked by walls/obstacles) or by CLICKing target coordinates to attempt a move/interaction; CLICK could also be used to switch/select between multiple selectable pieces when clicking on another piece’s position. If a move was blocked (by a wall, obstacle, or invalid target), the piece did not change position but still consumed a step, so efficient action planning and correct selection mattered under the finite step budget.

Agent explained goal and mechanics.

understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to complete the KA59 puzzle game by solving each level: every goal tile marked with a `+` had to be occupied simultaneously by a selectable piece in order to trigger a WIN and progress until the full run reports WIN.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement was done either by directional MOVE actions (moving the currently selected piece one grid step, blocked by walls/obstacles) or by CLICKing target coordinates to attempt a move/interaction; CLICK could also be used to switch/select between multiple selectable pieces when clicking on another piece’s position. If a move was blocked (by a wall, obstacle, or invalid target), the piece did not change position but still consumed a step, so efficient action planning and correct selection mattered under the finite step budget.
